project_name: Real RYS Wall-Clock Throughput for Budget-Pruned Representation Seeding

decision.recommended_next_action: Finalize this branch; optional future work is replication on additional model families or repeated cold/warm timing runs.
decision.stop_reason: The calibrated 5% candidate set preserved all 45 gpt2-medium blind winners and reduced same-harness wall-clock scan time from 3.336s to 0.203s (16.42x).

recommended_next_action: Finalize this branch; optional future work is replication on additional model families or repeated cold/warm timing runs.
run_notes_tail: UV_CACHE_DIR=/home/jeremy/projects/enoch_testing_ground/projects/source-record-redacted/.uv-cache uv pip install --python .venv/bin/python torch transformers numpy
- `scripts/benchmark_hf_block_scan_throughput.py`: shared loaded-model benchmark; each arm includes its own baseline forward plus interval scoring forwards after model/tokenizer load.
- `results/gpt2_medium_wall_clock_throughput.json`: raw per-arm wall-clock timing and top scored records.
- Exhaustive scan: `300` contiguous intervals, `3.336421793s` total scan time after model load.
- Calibrated budget-pruned scan: `17` intervals (`5.67%` of intervals; `94.33%` interval reduction), `0.203153068s` total scan time after model load.
- Wall-clock speedup: `16.4232x` total scan speedup and `17.4065x` scoring-only speedup.
- Recall preservation: current rerun against blind winners has `winner_count=45`, `full_recall=1.0`, `top_budget_recall=1.0`, `budget_size=17`, and `missed_winner_count=0`.

The branch kill condition is not supported. On the same model/task/scoring harness, the calibrated 5% representation-pruned candidate set preserves blind-winner recall and produces a real end-to-end scan wall-clock speedup close to the theoretical interval-count reduction. This branch can finalize positive; the main caveat is that the benchmark is a single warm GPU run on one model/probe suite, so broader replication would be follow-up evidence rather than required for this branch.
None running. The benchmark completed synchronously and no helper servers were launched.
